approach_summary: Followed the intellij-code-reference skill's pattern for 'what extends X' questions: MCP-only, no rg. Used mcp__idea__search_symbol('WorkflowAuditStrategy') to locate the base class and candidate subclasses in one semantic index-backed call, then cross-checked with mcp__idea__search_in_files_by_regex('extends\s+WorkflowAuditStrategy\b', *.java) as the skill recommends. Both returned the same 3 direct subclasses: OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy, BillWorkflowAuditStrategy, OrderReturnWorkflowAuditStrategy. Reported file:line with signatures per skill's output discipline.
